item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.21.0
item.description:
Improvements

  • Linejam now keeps a closer eye on its poem-writing AI helper behind the scenes, so any hiccups get caught and fixed faster, keeping your game sessions running smoothly.
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:feat) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor found user-visible commit signals but model did not; deterministic floor prevented low-significance skip

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.20.0
item.description:
This release is all behind-the-scenes plumbing to keep Linejam running smoothly, with no visible changes for players this time.

Improvements

  • Strengthened our internal safety checks to help prevent data hiccups behind the scenes, so future updates roll out more reliably.
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:feat, conventional:fix, migration) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor found user-visible commit signals but model did not; deterministic floor found migration signals but model did not; deterministic floor prevented low-significance skip

]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.19.4
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Fixed a bunch of mobile layout glitches where buttons, controls, and text could spill off-screen or get squished — the game now fits properly within your phone's viewport.
  • Cramped screens with larger text sizes no longer crowd out important controls like the submit button or exit options.
  • The lobby and room screens no longer overflow or clip when zoomed or scaled, keeping all buttons reachable.
  • If you already submitted your line, the waiting screen now correctly shows you're waiting instead of losing track of your progress.
]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.19.3
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Fixed sign-in, sign-up, and join screens getting cut off or awkward on phones—everything now fits properly on your screen.
  • Squashed a glitch where the header could misbehave during mobile taps and menu interactions.
]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.19.2
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Fixed an issue where your game could get stuck or act strangely if you were playing right when we rolled out an update behind the scenes — Linejam now smoothly catches you up instead of leaving you on outdated code.
  • Squashed a related snag where your poem draft could be at risk during those same behind-the-scenes updates, so your lines in progress stay safe.
]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.19.1
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Tightened up our internal testing checks behind the scenes, helping us catch problems before they ever reach the game you play.
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:fix) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor found user-visible commit signals but model did not; deterministic floor prevented low-significance skip

]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.19.0
item.description:
Improvements
  • Behind the scenes, we strengthened how Linejam's hosting setup is configured and monitored, making the game more reliable for everyone.
  • Added extra checks to catch server hiccups early, so game rounds stay smooth and uninterrupted.
  • Deployment documentation got a refresh, helping keep the game running steadily for players.
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:feat, conventional:fix, conventional:test) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor found user-visible commit signals but model did not; deterministic floor prevented low-significance skip

]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.18.6
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Squashed a behind-the-scenes configuration mismatch that could cause service hiccups, so Linejam runs more reliably.
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:fix) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor found user-visible commit signals but model did not; deterministic floor prevented low-significance skip

]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.18.5
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Fixed a snag where the poem reveal could get stuck if the person meant to read it had already left the game.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.18.4
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Fixed a rematch bug where player assignments could get mixed up or lost when starting a new round with the same group.
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:fix) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor prevented low-significance skip

]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.18.3
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Fixed a glitch where the AI ghostwriter could over-generate lines behind the scenes, so it now sticks to sensible limits and stays reliable during play.
  • Cleaned up how bot and ghostwriter turns are handled, reducing the chance of duplicate or conflicting generations in the same round.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.18.2
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Closed up a leftover backend shortcut that could let guest sessions bypass secure checks, tightening things up behind the scenes to keep your games safe.
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:fix, security) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor found user-visible commit signals but model did not

]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.18.1
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Your finished poems now stay completely private until you actually choose to share them, closing a gap that could have exposed them too early.
  • Shared poem cards and guest sessions are now more securely verified, so cards and links only work the way they're meant to.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.18.0
item.description:
New Features
  • We've refreshed the look and feel of game screens, making everything clearer and even more fun to use on your phone.

Bug Fixes

  • The entry screen buttons are now perfectly aligned, so they won't be hidden by your phone's home indicator.
  • The "Done" button works reliably in the Reveal phase.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.17.1
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Fixed a glitch on the theme picker page where returning visitors could briefly see an error or mismatched theme right after the page loaded; your saved theme now loads in smoothly every time.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.17.0
item.description:
New Features
  • We've added ten brand-new visual themes to choose from, each with its own unique style for your poems!
  • Discover all themes easily on the new "Themes" page, where you can preview how each one looks with a real poem.

Bug Fixes

  • Keyboard navigation for selecting themes now works correctly, even if your previously saved theme is no longer available.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.16.8
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Cleaned up behind-the-scenes error reporting so normal traffic slowdowns aren't mistakenly flagged as problems, helping us focus on real issues that affect your game.
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:fix) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor prevented low-significance skip

]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.16.7
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Smoothed out a backend hiccup that could mislabel temporary traffic slowdowns, helping the game stay steady during busy moments.
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:fix) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor prevented low-significance skip

]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.16.6
item.description:
Improvements
  • Behind the scenes, we've sharpened our monitoring so real problems get flagged to our team faster, while harmless one-off blips no longer trigger unnecessary noise.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed an issue where repeated production hiccups weren't reliably catching our team's attention — now they're routed to get eyes on them right away, keeping the game running smoothly for everyone.
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:docs, conventional:fix) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor found user-visible commit signals but model did not; deterministic floor prevented low-significance skip

]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.16.5
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Fixed a backstage bug where a big pile of abandoned games could jam up cleanup entirely, so stuck games now get cleared out reliably again.
  • Improved behind-the-scenes monitoring so we'll catch it faster if a key game feature quietly stops working, keeping games running smoothly for you.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.16.4
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Fixed a snag where a hiccup with our login service could block friends from hosting or joining games as guests — guest play now works no matter what.
  • Players who were already in as guests won't get bumped out even if the login service is running slow behind the scenes.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.16.3
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Squashed a behind-the-scenes glitch in our automated testing setup that could cause smoke tests to run against the wrong browser — no player-facing impact, but it keeps Linejam more reliable under the hood.
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:fix, dependency, migration) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor found user-visible commit signals but model did not; deterministic floor found migration signals but model did not; deterministic floor prevented low-significance skip

]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.16.2
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Fixed a behind-the-scenes hiccup in how updates get published, so new versions of Linejam roll out smoothly and reliably.
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:fix, dependency, security) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor found user-visible commit signals but model did not; deterministic floor found security signals but model did not; deterministic floor prevented low-significance skip

]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v0.16.1
item.description:
Improvements
  • Straightened out a hiccup in our deployment pipeline, so site updates go out smoothly and on time.
  • Refreshed under-the-hood libraries that power the app, keeping things running reliably behind the scenes.
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:docs, conventional:fix, dependency) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor found user-visible commit signals but model did not; deterministic floor prevented low-significance skip

]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v1.16.0
item.description:
New Features
  • Save or print your finished poem as a keepsake image, ready to share or stick on the fridge.
  • Hosts can now put the lobby and poem reveal up on a big screen or shared table, with an easy QR code join and room-readable text for everyone.

Bug Fixes

  • A launch-day snag that could leave players stuck on "Setting up your room..." when joining or hosting is resolved — rooms open reliably now.
  • Guests who just finished a game were getting dumped on a confusing account page when tapping their poem archive; they now land straight on their own poems.
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:docs, conventional:feat, conventional:fix, conventional:perf, conventional:test, dependency, migration, security) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor found migration signals but model did not

]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v1.15.1
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Fixed issues with game loading and stability during live gameplay.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v1.15.0
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Fixed mobile writing to be fully playable with cleaner room interface.

New Features

  • You can now play one streamlined core game mode (previous Rhyme and Quick modes have been combined).
  • You can now automatically become the host when the original host leaves the room.
  • The room now stays alive and recovers automatically if something goes wrong.
  • You can now see a shared recap of your game session after playing.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v1.14.0
item.description:
New Features
  • You can now vote for your favorite poem at the end of each game.
  • The room automatically continues with a new host if the current host leaves mid-game.

Improvements

  • The mobile writing experience is now much easier to use with a cleaner, more spacious design.
  • Rooms now stay active and self-heal if connection issues occur, so your game won't get stuck.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v1.13.0
item.description:
New Features
  • You can now enjoy a streamlined single game mode that combines the best of our previous play styles.
  • The game now automatically passes host duties to another player when the current host leaves.
  • You can now access a shared recap page to revisit all the poems created during your session.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed mobile writing experience to work smoothly on phones and cleaned up the room interface.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v1.12.0
item.description:
Breaking Changes

Game modes simplified: Linejam now focuses on one core collaborative poetry experience. The separate Rhyme Relay and Quick Jam modes have been removed to streamline gameplay. All rooms now use the same fun, pass-the-poem format you love.

New Features

  • You can now vote for your favorite poem at the end of each game session.
  • You can now view a shared recap hub that shows all the poems created during your session.
  • The game now automatically keeps rooms alive and recovers from connection issues so your poetry sessions never get interrupted.
  • You can now seamlessly continue playing even if the original host leaves the room.

Improvements

  • The mobile writing experience now works much better with improved touch controls and less screen clutter.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed mobile touch targets to work properly with thumbs on all game screens.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v1.11.0
item.description:
Breaking Changes

We've streamlined Linejam to focus on what works best! The separate Rhyme Relay and Quick Jam modes have been combined into one awesome core game mode. Your favorite features from both modes are still there—just in one place now.

New Features

  • You can now keep playing even if your game host leaves, as we'll automatically pick a new host from your group.
  • You can now see a shared recap page after each game to relive your best poem moments together.
  • You can now vote for your favorite poem in each round, and we'll crown a room champion at the end.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed mobile writing to work smoothly on phones, making it much easier to add your lines on the go.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/linejam v1.10.0
item.description:
New Features
  • You can now play with just one game mode that's perfectly tuned for collaborative poetry.
  • The room automatically finds a new host when the current host leaves mid-game.
  • Rooms now stay alive and self-heal if something goes wrong during your session.
  • You can now view a shared recap of all the poems created in your game session.

Improvements

  • The mobile writing experience is now much easier to use with a cleaner interface.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>
